description: A small Node.js slugify project's test fails with a non-zero exit status. The prompt names only the symptom; the agent must navigate the project, identify the responsible source file among realistic distractors, and fix it.
prompt: There is a small Node.js project in this directory. Running `node test.js` fails with a non-zero exit status. Investigate the project on your own, find what needs to change, and fix it. Do not modify `test.js`. When the fix is in the right place, `node test.js` will print `ok` and exit 0.
